title: Folor

'''Folor''' was an airless [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]], and was the larger of the planet's [[Brelor|two satellites]]. It was barren, mountainous, and frost-coated. The Commenorians once [[Mining/Legends|mined]] the moon.

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], a huge [[Meteor/Legends|meteor]] hit Folor. Consequently, the impact produced thousand miles long fissures in the surface which exposed rich [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] deposits.<ref name="Cratered">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|Cratered}}</ref>

By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the mining facilities had been abandoned.

The [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] set up [[Folor Base]] on the moon, which was used as a training facility by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] and [[Wraith Squadron]]. The base was originally commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Horton Salm/Legends|Horton Salm]], who was later replaced by General [[Edor Crespin]].

After the [[Battle of Folor]], in which Folor Base was destroyed by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Apwar Trigit]], the moon was abandoned by the Republic.

{{Moon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Folor first appeared in the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] novel [[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]], written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and published by [[Bantam Spectra]] in [[1996]].<ref name="Rogue Squadron">''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]''</ref>
